info.title: Syn137 Dashboard API
info.description: Dashboard API for Syntropic137. Provides real-time observability for workflow execution, agent sessions, and artifacts.

get.description: List all workflow templates.
Get workflow details by ID.
List all execution runs for a workflow.

Get execution history for a workflow.

DEPRECATED: Use /workflows/{workflow_id}/runs instead.
Get the status of a workflow execution.
List all active (non-completed) executions.

schema.title: Response List Active Executions Api Workflows Executions Active Get

get.description: List all workflow executions across all workflows.
Get detailed information about a workflow execution run.
List agent sessions with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Sessions Api Sessions Get

get.description: Get session details by ID.
List artifacts with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Artifacts Api Artifacts Get

get.description: Get artifact details by ID.
Get artifact content only (for large artifacts).

schema.title: Response Get Artifact Content Api Artifacts  Artifact Id  Content Get

get.description: Get aggregated metrics across all workflows or for a specific workflow.
Get tool execution timeline for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Tool Timeline Api Observability Sessions  Session Id  Tools Get

get.description: Get token usage metrics for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Token Metrics Api Observability Sessions  Session Id  Tokens Get

post.description: Cancel a running or paused execution.
Inject a message into the execution context.

get.description: Get current execution state.
List session costs with optional filtering.

schema.title: Response List Session Costs Api Costs Sessions Get

get.description: Get cost for a specific session.
List execution costs.

schema.title: Response List Execution Costs Api Costs Executions Get

get.description: Get aggregated cost for a workflow execution.
Get summary of all costs across sessions and executions.
Get all events for a session.
Get a timeline view of session events.

schema.title: Response Get Session Timeline Api Events Sessions  Session Id  Timeline Get

get.description: Get cost summary for a session.
Get tool usage summary for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Session Tools Api Events Sessions  Session Id  Tools Get

get.description: Get conversation log for a session.
Get conversation metadata for a session.

schema.title: Response Get Conversation Metadata Api Conversations  Session Id  Metadata Get
Response Register Trigger Api Triggers Post

get.description: List all trigger rules.

schema.title: Response List Triggers Api Triggers Get

get.description: Get trigger details.

schema.title: Response Get Trigger Api Triggers  Trigger Id  Get
Response Update Trigger Api Triggers  Trigger Id  Patch
Response Delete Trigger Api Triggers  Trigger Id  Delete

post.description: Enable a preset for a repository.

schema.title: Response Enable Preset Api Triggers Presets  Preset Name  Post

get.description: Get execution history for a trigger.

schema.title: Response Get Trigger History Api Triggers  Trigger Id  History Get

get.description:
Get all trigger activity (global).

Note: This falls back to domain-level projection since
global history aggregation is not yet in syn_api.

schema.title: Response Get All History Api Triggers History Get

post.description:
Handle GitHub webhooks.

Processes installation and other events via syn_api.v1.github.

schema.title: Response Github Webhook Webhooks Github Post

get.description: Health check for WebSocket subsystem.

schema.title: Response Websocket Health Ws Health Get

get.description: Root endpoint with API info.
Health check endpoint with detailed subscription status.

ConversationLine.title: ConversationLine
ConversationLine.description: A single line from the conversation log.

CostSummaryResponse.title: CostSummaryResponse
CostSummaryResponse.description: Summary of all costs across sessions/executions.

inputs.title: Inputs
inputs.description: Input variables for the workflow (e.g., topic, context). Keys must match {{variable}} placeholders in workflow prompts.

provider.title: Provider
provider.description: Agent provider to use (claude, openai, mock)

max_budget_usd.title: Max Budget Usd
max_budget_usd.description: Maximum budget in USD for this execution

ExecuteWorkflowRequest.title: ExecuteWorkflowRequest
ExecuteWorkflowRequest.description:
Request to execute a workflow.

IMPORTANT: Use 'inputs' not 'parameters' for workflow variables.
Extra fields are rejected to catch typos early.

ExecutionCostResponse.title: ExecutionCostResponse
ExecutionCostResponse.description: Aggregated cost for a workflow execution.

ExecutionDetailResponse.title: ExecutionDetailResponse
ExecutionDetailResponse.description: Detailed response for a workflow execution run.

ExecutionRun.title: ExecutionRun
ExecutionRun.description: A single execution run of a workflow (detailed view).

ExecutionRunListResponse.title: ExecutionRunListResponse
ExecutionRunListResponse.description: Response for listing workflow execution runs.

ExecutionRunSummary.title: ExecutionRunSummary
ExecutionRunSummary.description: Summary of a single execution run for list views.

ExecutionSummaryResponse.title: ExecutionSummaryResponse
ExecutionSummaryResponse.description: Summary of a workflow execution for list views.

InjectRequest.title: InjectRequest
InjectRequest.description: Request to inject context into an execution.

OperationInfo.title: OperationInfo
OperationInfo.description:
Information about a session operation.

Supports multiple operation types for full observability:
- MESSAGE_REQUEST/RESPONSE: LLM API calls
- TOOL_STARTED/COMPLETED/BLOCKED: Tool lifecycle
- THINKING: Extended thinking content
- ERROR: Error information

PhaseDefinition.title: PhaseDefinition
PhaseDefinition.description:
Phase definition within a workflow template.

This is the template definition, not execution state.
For phase execution details, see PhaseExecutionDetail.

PhaseExecutionInfo.title: PhaseExecutionInfo
PhaseExecutionInfo.description: Information about a phase execution within a run.

PhaseOperationInfo.title: PhaseOperationInfo
PhaseOperationInfo.description: Information about an operation within a phase.

SessionCostResponse.title: SessionCostResponse
SessionCostResponse.description: Cost for a single session (atomic unit).

WorkflowResponse.title: WorkflowResponse
WorkflowResponse.description:
Detailed workflow TEMPLATE response.

Templates don't have execution status.
For execution details, use /api/executions/{id}.

WorkflowSummary.title: WorkflowSummary
WorkflowSummary.description:
Summary of a workflow TEMPLATE for list views.

Note: Templates don't have status. Status belongs to executions.
